title: Aggressive Growth Sprint — Day 6 Report: Automated Monitoring + Safe Growth (Phase 13C.8)
sprint_theme: Automated Monitoring + Safe Growth — Let Google Process the 7 Submitted Pages

executive_summary.key_achievement: Built complete automated GSC UI indexing policy + queue system. 7 pages submitted yesterday (Jun 4) now in 48h cooldown. No edits to those pages — letting Google process.
executive_summary.biggest_win: safe-gsc-ui-indexing-queue.py — reusable, safety-gated automation that can process up to 10 URLs/day with strict eligibility gates

key_rules: Must pass 7 eligibility gates (HTTP 200, index/follow, self-canonical, in sitemap, not cleanup-lag, not recently requested, priority score)
Fallback: sitemap resubmit + internal links (do NOT ask Qasem immediately)
Priority order: fixed pages > core calcs > decisions > comparisons > near-winners > zero-click > repaired

features: Fallback actions on block (sitemap + internal links)
100% test pass — 7 candidates from queue, all approved

task3_48h_recheck.on_next_check: Record GSC status, indexed yes/no, last crawl date, canonical, impressions/clicks, next action

task5_selective_click_extraction.rule_enforced: Did NOT edit the 7 just-submitted pages. Focused on untouched pages only.
task5_selective_click_extraction.strategy: Strategic internal links from indexed core calculators to priority pages — boost crawl priority naturally

task6_pinterest_monitor.recommendation: Check Pinterest native analytics. Wait for Pins 1-2 data before posting 3-5.

checks_passed: Scenario sitemap: Not submitted to GSC ✅
checks_warn: Scenario sitemap returns 200 (empty valid <urlset> — NOT submitted to GSC, this is correct behavior)
task7_technical_cleanup.no_fake_404_bugs: CONFIRMED — 8 tracker bugs fixed in Phase 13C.7

compliance_confirmation.no_edits_to_7_submitted_pages: ✅ CONFIRMED — those 7 pages were NOT touched

biggest_blocker.current: Awaiting Google re-crawl of 7 submitted pages. CTR improvements (Days 4-5) won't take effect until Google re-crawls.
biggest_blocker.resolution: GSC UI Request Indexing completed for all 7 pages. Expected re-crawl within 24-72 hours.
biggest_blocker.next_challenge: Position depth — 7 pages rank 9-18. Title/meta fixes applied need re-crawl to impact CTR.

recommended_day7_actions: Qasem: Check GSC for 7 pages — any showing 'Submitted and indexed' with new crawl date?
Qasem: Check Pinterest native analytics — 120h milestone reached
Hermes: Re-run safe-gsc-ui-indexing-queue.py --dry-run to check next batch
Hermes: If 7 pages are re-crawled, run selective CTR extraction on new zero-click candidates
Hermes: Recheck core calculator indexing status (any changes?)
Do NOT request indexing for the same 7 pages again
Consider 1 high-quality blog post if a strong GSC query opportunity exists (max 1/week)
Monitor GSC for CTR changes — title/meta fixes need re-crawl to show impact

phase_13c_cumulative.sprint_status: Day 6 complete — Automation infrastructure built. 7 pages in Google's queue. Monitoring mode.
